text:
The Six-legged Flying Beasts are large, aggressive, and carnivorous animals, that reside somewhere near the Trick Tower. They will carry off and eat every human who happens to be outside below the top of the Trick Tower. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 2, Chapter 15 

Appearance

They take the appearance of a gigantic, six-legged creature with red or purple skin and feathered wings. They have narrow eyes and razor-sharp teeth that can easily tear a human apart.

Behavior

The moment anyone tries to climb down the Trick Tower, a swarm of the beasts surround the prey and snatch it off the tower. 

Plot

Hunter Exam arc

In the Third Phase of the Hunter Exam, examinee #86—an accomplished rock climber—tries to scale down the Trick Tower only to be met by a flock of six-legged flying beasts that tear him from the tower, while chewing and gnawing on him as they fly away. 

Trivia

Anime and Manga Differences

Concerning the limbs of the beast:
in the 2011 anime adaptation they have six arms and two legs; Hunter × Hunter - Episode 8 (2011) 
in the 1999 anime adaptation they only have a pair of arms and legs; Hunter × Hunter - Episode 13 (1999) 
and, in the manga, it seems variable as it is shown a specimen with only a pair of arms and legs and other without apparent arms, but the specimen in evidence/more detailed has two legs and four other arm/leg-like limbs. 
This article page, therefore, uses the manga depiction of this unnamed species as the basis for its descriptive title.
